Deadeye.description: Jump shots taken with a defender closing out receive less of a penalty from a shot contest.

Limitless Range.description: Extends the range from which a player can shoot three-pointers effectively from deep.

Mini Marksman.description: Elevates the likelihood of making perimeter shots over taller defenders.

Set Shot Specialist.description: Boosts the success rate and attributes when knocking down stand-still jump shots.

Shifty Shooter.description: Improves a player's ability to successfully make off-the-dribble, high-difficulty jump shots.

Aerial Wizard.description: Increases the ability to finish an alley-oop from a teammate, or putback a finish off an offensive rebound.

Float Game.description: Improves a player's ability to successfully make floaters and teardrops while driving.

Hook Specialist.description: Improves a player's ability to convert post hooks from the inside block position.

Layup Mixmaster.description: Improves a player's ability to successfully finish fancy, complex, or acrobatic layup animations.

Paint Prodigy.description: Improves a player's ability to quickly and efficiently score while going to work inside the paint.

Physical Finisher.description: Improves a player's ability to battle through defensive contact and convert contact layups.

Post Fade Phenom.description: Improves a player's ability to successfully make post fades and mid-range hop shots.

Post Powerhouse.description: Strengthens a player's success at backing down defenders and shifting them with dropsteps.

Post-Up Poet.description: Raises the chances of faking out or spinning past defenders when performing moves in the post.

Posterizer.description: Increases the likelihood of throwing down a driving contact dunk directly on your defender.

Rise Up.description: Increases the likelihood of dunking or posterizing opponents when standing completely still under the basket.

Ankle Assassin.description: Increases the ability to break down the defender, stagger them, or cross them up during dribble chains.

Bail Out.description: Passing out of a mid-air jump shot or layup yields fewer errant passes, and aids passing out of double teams.

Break Starter.description: Improves accuracy of deep, fast outlet passes made up the court immediately following a defensive rebound.

Dimer.description: When operating in the half-court, passes delivered to open teammates yield an offensive shot percentage boost.

Handles for Days.description: Reduces the stamina hit taken when performing consecutive dribble moves, allowing longer combo chains.

Lightning Launch.description: Speeds up acceleration bursts and explosive first steps when launching an attack from the perimeter.

Strong Handle.description: Reduces the likelihood of being bumped, physically bothered, or slowed down by defenders when dribbling.

Unpluckable.description: Decreases the success rate of defenders attempting to poke the ball free or strip it during dribbles.

Versatile Visionary.description: Improves a player's ability to thread tight passes and execute precision alley-oops quickly and on time.

Challenger.description: Improves the defensive impact and effectiveness of well-timed contests against perimeter shooters.

Glove.description: Increases the success rate of stealing from active ball-handlers or stripping shooters mid-layup.

Interceptor.description: Greatly increases the frequency of successfully tipped, deflected, or cleanly intercepted passes in passing lanes.

High-Flying Denier.description: Boosts the speed and leaping ability of a defensive player in anticipation of a transition block attempt.

Immovable Enforcer.description: Improves physical strength when bumping ball handlers, cutting off drives, and matching finishers down low.

Off-Ball Pest.description: Makes it easier to stick to matchups off-ball by allowing defensive grabs and resisting ankle-breaker moves.

On-Ball Menace.description: Hounds, clamps, and physically bodies up opposing players while defending them tightly on the perimeter.

Paint Patroller.description: Increases a player's vertical reach and recovery time to block or heavily contest shots at the rim.

Pick Dodger.description: Improves navigation around screens. At high levels, allows a player to physically blow through screen setups.

Post Lockdown.description: Strengthens defense against post moves and significantly increases the chance of stripping a post scorer.

Boxout Beast.description: Improves a player's physical ability to box out opponents and maintain critical leverage for rebounds.

Rebound Chaser.description: Improves tracking speed and jump distance, allowing players to secure rebounds from farther away.

Brick Wall.description: Increases screen effectiveness and actively drains physical energy from defenders upon impact.

Slippery Off-Ball.description: Helps offensive players smoothly navigate heavy traffic and avoid being bumped when running off screens.

Pogo Stick.description: Allows players to quickly bounce back up for a consecutive jump immediately after a rebound, block, or contest.
